steps.title: Calculate 20% discount
steps.content:
To find 20% of the original price, multiply 50 by 0.20:
$$0.20 \times 50 = 10$$
The discount amount is \$10.

steps.title: Compute sale price
steps.content:
Subtract the discount from the original price:
$$50 - 10 = 40$$
The sale price is \$40.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
